title: Requirement Discussion
description: We start with a focused call to understand your goals, audience, and the outcome you're hiring for.

title: Planning & Design
description: Wireframes, mood boards, and a clear scope are mapped out before a single line of code is written.

title: Development & Editing
description: Your site, video, or design is built in focused sprints, with progress shared at every milestone.

title: Testing & Revisions
description: Cross-device QA, performance checks, and revision rounds make sure everything holds up in the real world.

title: Final Delivery
description: You receive the finished, production-ready files along with deployment support and documentation.
